pi_items.metadata_value: UniProt hemoglobin beta subunit sequences (P68871, P02088, P02112, P02132, Q90485, P02070, P02062, P02067)
pi_items.verified_value: UniProt hemoglobin beta subunit sequences (P68871, P02088, P02112, P02132, Q90485, P02070, P02062, P02067)
pi_items.source: Downloaded FASTA file matches exact UniProt records for the specified species via the UniProt REST API.
The task description and setup_task.sh explicitly require this exact output path.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real hemoglobin beta subunit sequences from 8 different species downloaded from UniProt (P68871, P02088, P02112, P02132, Q90485, P02070, P02062, P02067). The sequences exactly match their respective UniProt FASTA entries. The expected output is a ClustalW alignment file explicitly saved to ~/UGENE_Data/results/hemoglobin_alignment.aln.
